title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) Resolution NO. 19-09, ?Resolution approving the adjusted 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund of the Municipality of Los Baños amounting to Seventeen Million One Hundred Eighty-Six Thousand Three Hundred Sixty-Five Pesos and 50/100 (P 17,186,365.50) for CY 2020.?
